### 👨🏻‍💻 &nbsp;About Me

<p align="left"> 
💻 I am a Software Engineer and a graduate of the Federal University of Ceará, actively deepening my expertise in Cybersecurity and Data Science. My mission is to architect, maintain, and secure complex systems. I do not believe in 'innate talent' as a shortcut to mastery; instead, I rely on discipline, resilience, and an unwavering work ethic to overcome challenges and continuously expand my skill set.<br>
✉️ &nbsp;You can email me at natanaelmgconta@gmail.com. I'll try to respond as soon as possible!<br>
📄 &nbsp;You can check my [LinkedIn](https:/www.linkedin.com/in/natanaelmon/) for more details about work experience.
</p>
